payload.title: Cross-crate signature-index auto-extraction
payload.description:
Extract named-arg signature indices from arbitrary dependencies so R0042 enforces across the crate boundary, not just in-crate.

Approaches, cheapest first:
1. cargo trust index — emit a sidecar signature file per crate at build time.
2. Parse rustdoc JSON for dependency signatures.
3. Read .rmeta metadata directly.

Done when: a positional call into a third-party fn with arity>1 is rejected/reordered against an auto-extracted index, with no hand-written trust-std-style shim. Removes the 'largest open gap' caveat from docs/WHY.md.
